title: Jhonny Pack
description:
the weird paradox-like minecraft version you finally found after years of wishing for it...

one rule: no hunger
body:
_"Ah yes, you found me, finaly, the name is Jhonny and i am a minecraft researcher, you finally helped me find a version that would make someone happy, someone with infinite dreams about this game, someone that doesnt feel like playing in the modern versions, and someone that doesnt like the Hunger System. is that. you ? innit ?"_
_- Jhonny: The Scientist_


**this pack is made as a passion project, using the best optimization and adventure mods i could find here on Modrynth, and also mods that remind me of the beta days of modded minecraft.**

it uses "Fabulously Optimized" as a base for performance mods, and it works great
the modpack aims revamp the vanilla experience by using create and paradise lost to enhance the experience, origins mod to make every playthrough feel unique and nostalgic tweaks to make the game feel like the old beta days while also incorporating modern mechanics like the combat introduced in 1.9

# Look at the gallery for screenshots i took while testing
(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d65120d7c1ac4e88d702c6d5e60914ddfeddb777.png)

Some of the mods this pack include:
- Create
- Paradise Lost
- Origins (and its Vampire Addon)
- Valkyrien Skies 2
- Gliders
- Inventory Sorter
- Adventurer's Backpack
- Yung's Entire Catalog of World-gen mods
- Nostalgic Tweaks (remember, no hunger)

Quality of Life Stuff:
- Midnight Controls (Controller Support)
- Smooth Boot

Visuals and Etc:
- 3D Skin Layers
- Replay Mod
- Essential (for Easy Multiplayer)
- Chisel Refabricated (because i love the extra blocks)
- Sodium, Lithium and Phosphor.

**that is mostly it, the pack is still in testing, and i will add more mods later down the line
until i feel like the pack has become its own experience, also multiplayer should work.**
